how_verified: BY USE against the live resident 4B (cyankiwi/Qwen3.5-4B-AWQ-4bit @ :8000; company gpu confirmed chat-4b+embed-bge floor before AND after — untouched). (1) REPRODUCED first: fired roles/repo_digest via the exact ingest framing (FILE <path> + head[:6000], max_tokens=200, cognition.run_role) over the 3 known-failing files — all 3 failed deterministically with FabricError unparseable JSON (bridge.py: "Expecting ':' delimiter line 1 col 251" · roles/check.py: "Expecting property name... line 15 col 67" · nodes/portal.py: "Unterminated string line 2 col 19"), ~15s retry burn each. (2) FIX = the ONE missing hand-off (LAW-0: the json_schema transport branch was ALREADY built+proven by the L-transport lane, tests/json_schema_transport_acceptance.py — complete() just never passed schema through): client.complete() now derives opts['json_schema']={name: <class>, schema: model_json_schema()} from its schema= param unless the caller passed json_schema explicitly (explicit None = documented opt-out); _apply_response_format's existing precedence (json_schema > json=True) does the rest. (3) RE-FIRED the regression set: ALL THREE files now return valid schema-conformant digests in 0.5-0.7s (no retries). (4) Normal role fire: verify_lens returns its full validated verdict dict (same shape); (5) embed op: run_role(op=embed) unaffected (1024-dim BGE-M3, never touches complete()). (6) Suites, all green: json_schema_transport (17) · fabric_retry · fabric_tools · e3_fabric · transport_rep_penalty (15) · e3_integration (live) · cascade_acceptance (26, live repo_digest fan end-to-end) · coa_acceptance (27, the other schema= caller) · mcp_engine_acceptance (35, lane-required) · run_items (32) · reduce (28) · generation_policy_ladder (18, the ladder path also carries the derived constraint) · chunk_compose (30) · embeddings (12) · drift (5). vLLM did NOT reject guided decoding: /tmp/ltransport_evidence.json shows resident_accepts_json_schema=true AND resident_constrains_decode=true (neg-control: a no-JSON prompt still returned conformant JSON).
needs_tim: Nothing gating. Two observations: (a) the coa framing call (suite.py:6399, schema=CoaFraming) now also rides guided decode — on the resident vLLM this is pure strengthening; IF the RHM brain is ever re-bound to a cloud endpoint that 400s on json_schema (ops/cli/capabilities.py already flags 'cloud may 400'), coa degrades via its existing loud degrade path instead of framing — the repo's own declared posture (fail loud, never silent downgrade), and coa_acceptance still passes; flagged so it isn't a surprise during a live model swap. (b) bridge.py's digest is now VALID JSON but the 4B put the digest text in the 'kind' field (schema-valid, semantically swapped) — a model-quality matter at the role/prompt layer (roles/repo_digest.py, not my lane), not a transport defect; re-ingesting bridge.py will succeed either way.
notes: Root cause (evidence-traced): run_role passed schema=role.output_schema into complete(), where schema is a NAMED param — it never reached the transport's **opts, so _apply_response_format only ever saw json=True -> json_object (unconstrained decode); the 4B then deterministically emitted malformed JSON on 3 file-heads and complete()'s 4 retries at temp 0 reproduced the same bytes into FabricError. The fix finishes the half-built L-transport seam rather than forking: zero new transport code paths, one derivation in complete() + docstring/constitution integration. Schema-compatible: callers passing NO schema build byte-identical request bodies (derivation keys on the schema= param; the allowlist still excludes json_schema from _SAMPLING_KEYS so it can't leak); schema= callers keep the identical RETURN shape (validated model -> model_dump), client-side parse/validate/retry remains the guarantee (F9).
